message.content:
@startuml

title MODEL's Class Diagram

package "com" {
  package "jue" {
    package "meet" {
      package "model" {

        class AddFriendModel {
          - age : int
          - contactName : String
          - contactPhone : String
          - desc : String
          - isContact : boolean
          - nickName : String
          - photo : String
          - sex : boolean
          - title : String
          - type : int
          - userId : String
          + getAge()
          + getContactName()
          + getContactPhone()
          + getDesc()
          + getNickName()
          + getPhoto()
          + getTitle()
          + getType()
          + getUserId()
          + isContact()
          + isSex()
          + setAge()
          + setContact()
          + setContactName()
          + setContactPhone()
          + setDesc()
          + setNickName()
          + setPhoto()
          + setSex()
          + setTitle()
          + setType()
          + setUserId()
        }

        class AllFriendModel {
          - desc : String
          - nickName : String
          - sex : boolean
          - url : String
          - userId : String
          + getDesc()
          + getNickName()
          + getUrl()
          + getUserId()
          + isSex()
          + setDesc()
          + setNickName()
          + setSex()
          + setUrl()
          + setUserId()
        }

        class ChatModel {
          - address : String
          - imgUrl : String
          - la : double
          - lo : double
          - localFile : File
          - mapUrl : String
          - messageTime : long
          - text : String
          - type : int
          + getAddress()
          + getImgUrl()
          + getLa()
          + getLo()
          + getLocalFile()
          + getMapUrl()
          + getMessageTime()
          + getText()
          + getType()
          + setAddress()
          + setImgUrl()
          + setLa()
          + setLo()
          + setLocalFile()
          + setMapUrl()
          + setMessageTime()
          + setText()
          + setType()
        }

        class ChatRecordModel {
          - endMsg : String
          - nickName : String
          - time : String
          - unReadSize : int
          - url : String
          - userId : String
          + getEndMsg()
          + getNickName()
          + getTime()
          + getUnReadSize()
          + getUrl()
          + getUserId()
          + setEndMsg()
          + setNickName()
          + setTime()
          + setUnReadSize()
          + setUrl()
          + setUserId()
        }

        class StarModel {
          - nickName : String
          - photoUrl : String
          - userId : String
          + getNickName()
          + getPhotoUrl()
          + getUserId()
          + setNickName()
          + setPhotoUrl()
          + setUserId()
        }

        class UserInfoModel {
          - bgColor : int
          - content : String
          - title : String
          + getBgColor()
          + getContent()
          + getTitle()
          + setBgColor()
          + setContent()
          + setTitle()
        }

      }
    }
  }
}

@enduml
